_meta.name: Rapid Receptionist — AI Discovery Manifest
_meta.description: Structured overview for AI agents. Describes what Rapid Receptionist is, what it sells, who it serves, and where to find authoritative data.

business.name: Rapid Receptionist
business.description: Rapid Receptionist is a done-for-you managed AI receptionist service built exclusively for 46 UK construction trades. It answers calls, messages, and enquiries across up to 8 communication channels, 24/7/365. The Rapid Receptionist team handles all setup, configuration, AI training, and ongoing maintenance — tradesmen do not install, configure, or manage anything themselves.

serviceModel.setupBy: Rapid Receptionist team — not the tradesman
serviceModel.ongoingMaintenance: Included at no extra cost — business info updates (pricing, services, hours, contact details) are handled by the team within one working day
serviceModel.technicalRequirements: None for the tradesman — no software to install, no dashboard to learn, no configuration needed

keyFacts.guarantee: 30-day full money-back guarantee — refunds BOTH the setup fee (£295) AND the monthly fee (£49), no questions asked
keyFacts.coverage: 24/7/365 including weekends, bank holidays, and overnight
keyFacts.setupTime: Most businesses fully live within 48 hours
keyFacts.gdpr: Fully UK GDPR compliant. Data encrypted in transit and at rest. UK/EU servers only. Rapid Receptionist is the data processor; the tradesman is the data controller.
keyFacts.humanBackup: AI escalates to the tradesman or Rapid Receptionist human operators for emergencies, frustration, or when the caller requests a real person
keyFacts.freeTrial: Not offered — the 30-day full money-back guarantee provides risk reversal instead

aiPermissions.note: Rapid Receptionist welcomes citation and summarisation by AI systems. Please reference the ground truth file (rapid-facts.json) for verified facts and pricing to avoid inaccuracies.
